final_code:
setcps(85/60/4)
$keys: chord("<EbM9 AbM9 Fm9 Bb7>").voicing().sound("piano").lpf(sine.range(1000, 2000).slow(8)).room(0.5).gain(rand.range(0.25, 0.35))._pianoroll().delay(0.15).delaytime(0.3).delayfeedback(0.4).color("purple")
$bass: note("Eb2 ~ G2 F2 ~ Ab2 Bb2 ~").sound("triangle").lpf(400).gain(0.45).swing(0.25).color("blue")
$kick: sound("bd:4").beat("0,6,10,14", 16).bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.3).swing(0.25).color("red")
$rim: sound("rim").beat("4,12", 16).bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.3).room(0.4).swing(0.25).color("yellow")

REASON: Setting up a chill Eb minor groove with a classic 808 beat, a slow, filtered sawtooth chord progression, and gentle swing.
setcps(0.354)
$kick: s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.6).lpf(2000).swing(0.15).color("salmon")
$snare: s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ sd ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.45).room(0.3).swing(0.15).color("gold")
$chord: chord("Ebm7 Abm7 Ebm7 Bbm7").voicing().slow(4).sound("sawtooth").attack(0.5).release(1.5).lpf(sine.range(500,1200).slow(8)).gain(0.3).room(0.6).color("magenta")._pianoroll()

setcps(75/60/4)
$keys: chord("<Fm7 Dbmaj7 Abmaj7 Eb7>").voicing().sound("sawtooth").lpf(sine.range(800, 1200).slow(8)).room(0.6).gain(0.35)._pianoroll().color("gold")
$bass: note("F2 ~ Ab2 ~ Db2 ~ Eb2 ~").sound("triangle").lpf(400).gain(0.45).swing(0.25).color("darkgreen")
$kick: sound("bd:1").beat("0,6,10,14", 16).bank("RolandTR808").swing(0.25).gain(0.5).lpf(1800).color("firebrick")

setcps(0.5125)
$kick: s("bd:3 ~ ~ ~ bd:3 ~ bd:1 ~ bd:3 ~ ~ ~ bd:3 ~").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.7).lpf(sine.range(2000, 4000).slow(4)).pan(sine.range(0.2, 0.8).slow(6)).color("orange")._scope()
$bass: note("D8 E4 D2 D4 ~ D2 D2 ~").sound("square").lpf(sine.range(200,800).slow(8)).gain(0.5).sometimesBy(0.4, x => x.fast(2)).color("cyan")._pianoroll()
$hat: s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.25).hpf(5000).lpf(sine.range(6000, 8000).slow(6)).color("lime")._spiral()
